pages.title: Engineer
pages.text: Craft primary. The industrial class. After picking Engineer, a second screen asks you to choose one of three disciplines.$(br2)Trains and Create base materials (andesite alloy, casings, precision mechanism, train tracks) stay open to everyone. Engineer is about the machines built on top of that supply chain.

pages.title: The three disciplines
pages.text: $(li)$(l:classes/eng_aeronautical)Aeronautical Engineer$(/l) — aircraft and mining vehicles.$(li)$(l:classes/eng_mechanical)Mechanical Engineer$(/l) — gears, presses, mills, mid-tier machines.$(li)$(l:classes/eng_electrical)Electrical Engineer$(/l) — motors, batteries, wires, electric tools.

pages.title: Hub interlock
pages.text: Mechanical is the hub. Both Aero and Electrical top-tier items require a Mechanical-made part as an ingredient.$(br2)Picking Mech is a useful service on any server.
